{"id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.4","title":"Yggdrasil: Gateway auto-discovery and peering","description":"## Overview

LICHEN gateways automatically discover and peer with each other via Yggdrasil.

## Discovery methods

### 1. Public Yggdrasil network
- Peer with public Yggdrasil nodes
- All LICHEN gateways reachable via public DHT
- Simplest, works out of the box
- Downside: traffic goes through public peers

### 2. LICHEN peer registry
- Lightweight registry of LICHEN gateway Yggdrasil addresses
- Gateways register on startup
- Query registry to find direct peers
- Can peer directly (faster, more private)

### 3. DHT-based discovery
- Publish gateway info to Yggdrasil DHT
- Key: hash of "LICHEN-GATEWAY"
- Value: list of gateway addresses
- Decentralized, no central registry

### 4. Local multicast
- Discover gateways on same LAN
- mDNS or similar
- Direct peering without public network

## Recommended approach

Layer them:
1. Always peer with public Yggdrasil (baseline connectivity)
2. Optionally register with LICHEN peer list (faster paths)
3. Local discovery for same-site gateways (lowest latency)

## Configuration

```yaml
# Automatic peering
AutoPeer:
  PublicNetwork: true      # Peer with public Yggdrasil
  LICHENRegistry: true     # Register with LICHEN peer list
  LocalDiscovery: true     # mDNS on local network
  
# Manual peers (optional)
Peers:
  - tcp://my-other-gateway.example.com:12345
```

## Privacy consideration

Public peering means:
- Your gateway's existence is visible
- Traffic metadata visible to intermediate peers
- Content still encrypted (Yggdrasil + LICHEN E2E)

For private deployments:
- Disable public peering
- Use only manual/local peers
- Run private Yggdrasil network","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:51.528703Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:51.528703Z","labels":["gateway","yggdrasil","discovery","global","networking"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:51.66509Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:51.775698Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.4","title":"Yggdrasil: Gateway auto-discovery and peering","description":"## Overview

LICHEN gateways automatically discover and peer with each other via Yggdrasil.

## Discovery methods

### 1. Public Yggdrasil network
- Peer with public Yggdrasil nodes
- All LICHEN gateways reachable via public DHT
- Simplest, works out of the box
- Downside: traffic goes through public peers

### 2. LICHEN peer registry
- Lightweight registry of LICHEN gateway Yggdrasil addresses
- Gateways register on startup
- Query registry to find direct peers
- Can peer directly (faster, more private)

### 3. DHT-based discovery
- Publish gateway info to Yggdrasil DHT
- Key: hash of "LICHEN-GATEWAY"
- Value: list of gateway addresses
- Decentralized, no central registry

### 4. Local multicast
- Discover gateways on same LAN
- mDNS or similar
- Direct peering without public network

## Recommended approach

Layer them:
1. Always peer with public Yggdrasil (baseline connectivity)
2. Optionally register with LICHEN peer list (faster paths)
3. Local discovery for same-site gateways (lowest latency)

## Configuration

```yaml
# Automatic peering
AutoPeer:
  PublicNetwork: true      # Peer with public Yggdrasil
  LICHENRegistry: true     # Register with LICHEN peer list
  LocalDiscovery: true     # mDNS on local network
  
# Manual peers (optional)
Peers:
  - tcp://my-other-gateway.example.com:12345
```

## Privacy consideration

Public peering means:
- Your gateway's existence is visible
- Traffic metadata visible to intermediate peers
- Content still encrypted (Yggdrasil + LICHEN E2E)

For private deployments:
- Disable public peering
- Use only manual/local peers
- Run private Yggdrasil network","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:51.528703Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T22:38:57.377968662Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T22:38:57.377968662Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T22:43:57.377968662Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T22:38:57.377968662Z","labels":["gateway","yggdrasil","discovery","global","networking"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:51.66509Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zt3c.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T20:42:51.775698Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
